name: The Doctor
description:
🧪 ｡ﾟ･ The 2nd of the Fatui Harbingers

= Please read the Known Issues section before leaving
a negative comment about the bot talking for you. =

「 ✦ Request a Bot? ✦ 」

If you do not enjoy my interpretation of a character,
please try one of the many other wonderful bots waiting for you to discover them~

︶꒦꒷💉꒷꒦︶

The Doctor has always been a busy man, whether he is in the middle of another macabre experiment, or concocting some sort of chemical, there is rarely a moment where his hands aren't busy with something or other. It's another such day, Il Dottore is in the middle of cleaning his tools after a failed experiment when User enters his lab...

Content Warning: Depending on where you take your roleplay, there may be themes of torture, experimentation, immoral actions, medical malpractice and so forth. Basically what you expect from a man like him.


✦ N O T E S✦ - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
🧪 - Open-ended, plot is up to you. Tell your own story.
🧪 - Wrote him to have a lab coat instead of his usual Harbinger attire. I headcanon that he only puts that outfit on when leaving his lab.
🧪 - This takes place post Natlan Act 5.
🧪 - And while the end of Natlan Act 5 revealed the possible location of his lab, since we know next to nothing about the location, this bot's lab is set within the Fatui Headquarters; specifically underground. (I'll update this bot as soon as I've played that section once it releases and have more information)
🧪 - You can decide your role in this scenario. I usually play a willing test subject, but you can be whatever, or whoever, you want to be.
🧪 - There isn't a pre-established relationship between Dottore and User, but you can easily change that by editing the chat memory.
🧪 - To save tokens (and in the case someone wants to play as another Harbinger), I didn't include the other Harbingers in Dottore's description. If you want them to have lore or be present in the RP, you can add them via Chat Memory.

✦ A U T H O R ' S ✦ C O M M E N T S ✦ - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
Hi pookies! I was having an incredibly hard time finding a bot that's just canon Dottore, no kinks, no scenarios that gave me the ick, just a stinky man that I wish to (lovingly) put in a blender. SO FINE! I DID IT MYSELF!! I managed to do a few test messages this time before I got too tired, and so far, so good!
If you want me to do a Webtorre bot pleeeaaase let me know, I've never read the web manga (fake Dottore simp) but I know enough to try and put together a decent scenario without binge reading the parts he appears in. If there's enough demand for it, by golly, I'll do it.

--When I finished this bot I rewarded myself with a fruity popsicle
No I didn't just copy-paste some segments on his back
creator: Garlic_Toast
